creator: james@netinertia.co.uk
text:
Kozo Nishida wrote:
>> Description:
> My machine is hp ML110 M5.
> I installed FreeBSD RELEASE-7.0 amd64 to this machine.
> But I couldn' reboot this machine, even if I disabled acpi.
> The console stopped next line of Uptime: 6m1s, and no progress.
> 
> 
>> How-To-Repeat:
> Install FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE amd64 to hp ML110 M5.
> # shutdown -r now

Hello Nishida-san,

Please look at PR amd64/122473 - jhb@ already addressed this issue for 
me by updating ehci_pci.c from RELENG_7.

James
